design_system.border_radius: 4px for cards, 2px for buttons (sharp, editorial feel)

sections.layout: Split layout — large typography left, looping showreel video or animated graphic right
sections.animation: Staggered text reveal on load, subtle parallax on scroll, cursor-following glow effect

sections.layout: Full-width horizontal auto-scroll strip between hero and about

content.headline: Design is my language. Motion is my voice.
content.bio: A short 2–3 sentence bio about your background, design philosophy, and what drives your work.
content.image: Professional photo or illustrated avatar, grainy film texture overlay

sections.layout: Two-column — image left (60%), text and stats right (40%)
sections.animation: Counter animation on stats when scrolled into view

services.title: Brand Identity
services.description: Logos, visual systems, color guides, and brand guidelines built to last.

services.title: Motion Graphics
services.description: Animated logos, explainer videos, social content, and broadcast-ready motion.

services.title: Visual Design
services.description: Posters, packaging, editorial layouts, and digital assets that demand attention.

services.title: Video Editing
services.description: Cuts, color grading, and motion overlays for reels, ads, and short films.

sections.layout: Horizontal card row, each card expands on hover to reveal description
sections.animation: Cards slide up on scroll with stagger delay

projects.title: Project One
projects.thumbnail: Full-bleed image or looping video thumbnail

projects.title: Project Four
projects.thumbnail: Grid of social posts or reel preview

sections.layout: Asymmetric masonry grid — large featured card (col-span 2), alternating sizes. Hover reveals project title, category, and arrow link.
sections.animation: Smooth scale-up on hover, cursor changes to custom 'View' cursor

content.headline: Motion Reel
content.poster_image: Dark cinematic still from the reel

sections.layout: Full-width video player with custom play button overlay, muted autoplay background loop. Click to play full audio.
sections.animation: Slow zoom on poster image before play, progress bar on video

sections.layout: Horizontal logo/icon row with tool names below, subtle hover lift effect

testimonials.quote: Placeholder quote — a short, powerful client testimonial.
testimonials.author: Client Name

testimonials.quote: Placeholder quote — another great testimonial about your work.
testimonials.author: Client Name

testimonials.quote: Placeholder quote — mention specific results or impact.
testimonials.author: Client Name

sections.layout: Auto-advancing horizontal carousel, quote in large italic type

content.headline: Let's Build Something Great.
content.subheadline: Open to freelance, collaborations, and full-time roles.

sections.layout: Full-screen dark section, large centered headline, email link, social icon row below
sections.animation: Glitchy text scramble effect on headline on scroll-in

global_interactions.cursor: Custom circular cursor that scales up on hover over links and project cards
global_interactions.page_transition: Fade or slide wipe between pages
global_interactions.loading_screen: Brief animated logo or name reveal before site loads

nav.style: Minimal fixed top navbar, transparent until scroll, blurs on scroll
nav.logo: Your name or monogram in the top-left

global_interactions.footer: Minimal — copyright, email, and social links. One-liner tagline.

technical_preferences.framework: React + Vite preferred, or vanilla HTML/CSS/JS
technical_preferences.animations: Framer Motion or GSAP for scroll-triggered animations
technical_preferences.video_handling: Lazy-load videos, autoplay muted, fallback poster image
technical_preferences.performance: Optimize images as WebP, defer non-critical JS
